hero.imageAlt: Modern suite with wood balconies on a misty tropical mountainside, dense green forest and soft overcast light

narrative.heading: Suspended Among the Giants
paragraphs: Perched seventy feet above the forest floor, The Canopy Suite is an architectural marvel that breathes with the rainforest. Here, the boundary between interior and exterior dissolves, replaced by panoramic views of the emerald skyline.

Designed by sustainable visionaries, the suite utilizes reclaimed teak and floor-to-ceiling glass to create a space that is both a sanctuary and a lens through which to witness the untamed beauty of Costa Rica.

sideImage.alt: Interior detail of a luxury treehouse suite with warm wood, linen bedding, and forest light through large windows

quote.text: A living poetry of wood, wind, and wonder.

items.title: Private Infinity Pool
items.description: Edge-less waters that merge with the horizon, heated by solar energy for midnight reflection.

items.title: Outdoor Stone Bath
items.description: Carved from local volcanic rock, positioned for optimal stargazing under the canopy.

items.title: Personal Butler
items.description: A dedicated curator for your stay, from private expeditions to terrace dining arrangements.

images.alt: Twin beds with white textured bedding, a woven pendant lamp, and floor-to-ceiling glass opening onto lush tropical foliage
Generous morning breakfast on a wooden table—tea, fresh herbs and vegetables, cheeses, and warm dishes in bright natural light
Stone sink and matte black fixtures overlooking a private tropical courtyard
Evening balcony with dining set and warm lighting against twilight jungle

booking.title: Reserve This Sanctuary
booking.description: Reconnect with the rhythm of nature. Our concierge is ready to tailor your journey from the moment of inquiry.
